articles.title: Victoria Beckham On Fame, Fashion & Empowering Women Through Reinvention I N18G
articles.description: At the recently concluded 'TIME100 Summit', Victoria Beckham opened up about her journey from Spice Girls to becoming a successful fashion and beauty entrepreneur. Reflecting on fame, resilience, and reinvention, she spoke about using her public platform to connect with audiences, her hands-on approach to product creation, and her mission to empower women. From raising a fashion-loving daughter to building a trusted global brand, Beckham shares how confidence and creativity continue to shape her evolution.

articles.title: Veteran Bengali actor Biplab Dasgupta passes away at 75 in Kolkata
articles.description: Veteran Bengali actor and elocutionist Biplab Dasgupta, celebrated for his work in films like 'Baishey Shraban' and 'Gumnaami', passed away at 75 after a prolonged illness. Following post-operative complications, he experienced discomfort at his residence and died en route to the hospital. His contributions extended to popular TV serials, and the film and television fraternity paid their final respects.

articles.title: Mamitha Baiju Breaks Silence On ‘Non-Tamil Actors’ Casting Row Ahead Of Kara Release
articles.description: Mamitha Baiju recently spoke about the ‘non-Tamil actors’ casting debate ahead of Kara, stating she accepted the role to challenge herself. The film starring Dhanush in the lead is set to release on April 30.

articles.title: Jake Paul reacts to Marlon and Jutta Leerdam controversy, calls out Twitch streamer
articles.description: A social media spat has erupted between Twitch streamer Marlon Lundgren Garcia and boxing star Jake Paul. The dispute began when Garcia livestreamed from a football tournament where Jake Paul's fiancée, Jutta Leerdam, was competing. Leerdam expressed frustration with excessive vlogging. Paul responded, defending his fiancée's content creation. Garcia then fired back, questioning Paul's relevance and ego.

articles.title: ‘What an artist...’: Revathy gets nostalgic after watching Michael Jackson’s biopic ‘Michael’
articles.description: Actress-filmmaker Revathy shared that the film ‘Michael’ brought back memories of Michael Jackson’s peak in the 1980s. She praised his artistry, stage presence, and legacy of inspiring through music.

articles.title: Abhay Deol reveals how he improvised a dialogue-free scene in Anurag Kashyap’s ‘Dev.D’: 'Came over to me and then hugged me'
articles.description: Abhay Deol revisited Dev D memories, revealing he improvised a no-dialogue scene, impressing Anurag Kashyap. He shared a clip with Parakh Madan, explaining how spontaneity shaped the moment. The film, co-starring Mahie Gill and Kalki Koechlin, is a modern take on Devdas, set in Punjab and Delhi, exploring Dev’s emotional downfall.

articles.title: 5 relationship lessons to learn from Sudha Murty-Narayana Murthy
articles.description: When people talk about Sudha Murty and Narayana Murthy, it’s usually about their success. But honestly, what’s just as impressive - maybe even more - is the way they’ve managed their relationship all these years.There’s nothing overly dramatic about their story. No grand, filmi moments. It’s simple, steady, and real. And that’s exactly why it hits home. There’s a lot you can actually learn from it if you’re trying to build something meaningful with someone.Here are five lessons from their relationship, in a way that actually makes sense in everyday life.
